heading: Limitation on total expenditures
label: 518f Limitation on total expenditures
text: The total amount expended by the Secretary from the Tobacco Trust Fund to make payments under sections 518a and 518b of this title and for the other authorized purposes of the Fund shall not exceed $10,140,000,000.
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to the 2005 and subsequent crops of tobacco, see , set out as a note under .section 643 of Pub. L. 108–357section 518 of this title
